message:
fix: guard against int64 overflow in backoff delay calculation

The calculateDelay() function converts float64 back to time.Duration
(int64 nanoseconds) after multiplying by the backoff multiplier. When
currentDelay is large, the float64 product can exceed MaxInt64 and
wrap to a negative Duration BEFORE the MaxDelay cap on the next line.

Fix: compare the float64 product against float64(MaxDelay) BEFORE
converting to time.Duration, preventing the overflow entirely.

Closes #45

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
